summary: Excellent show featuring Stephen Stills as a guest and a good-quality recording
review: The reviewer rates the concert an outstanding performance, highlighting the addition of Stephen Stills as a great touch. The recording is described as good, though no technical details are provided. Overall, both the music and the capture are viewed positively.

ai_rating.rationale: Single 5‑star review praising both the show and recording; limited detail keeps confidence low but overall rating is high.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls it a good recording but gives no specifics about soundboard, clarity, or mix.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No comments on set structure or pacing were provided.
